title.purpose: Compact section headings, card titles, and dialogs.

body.purpose: Chat prose, settings descriptions, and general interface text.

label.purpose: Metadata, controls, status, and command annotations.

mono.purpose: Paths, branches, code, terminal-adjacent labels, and keyboard-centric details.

elevation.foregroundPanel: shadow-lg/5 for menus, dialogs, comboboxes, command palettes

motion.reducedMotion: Disable nonessential enter animations and keep state changes direct.

componentSnippets.buttonPrimary: rounded-lg border-primary bg-primary text-primary-foreground shadow-primary/24 shadow-xs focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring
componentSnippets.inputDefault: rounded-lg border-input bg-background text-foreground shadow-xs/5 focus-visible:border-ring focus-visible:ring-[3px]

do: Use Agent Blue only for primary action, focus, selection, and meaningful state.
Keep terminal and diff surfaces visually primary.
dont: Do not make the app feel like a generic SaaS dashboard, chat toy, flashy AI wrapper, or bloated IDE clone.
Do not add decorative feature explanations, noisy onboarding, or UI chrome that competes with code and diffs.
Do not use gradient text, side-stripe borders, decorative glassmorphism, hero metrics, or repeated identical card grids.
